root_cause_confirmed: STATUS/panel could query live MT5 position state through support code that called mt5.initialize; if MT5 was closed, that status query could relaunch terminal.

stop_false_positive.fix: STOP now reads an explicit OPEN_POSITION_STATUS instead of relying on fragile text matching of OPERACION_ABIERTA.

changes_applied: Added passive MT5 terminal check mode in phase37_ftmo_trial_support.py.
Quick status panel skips live position checks when terminal64.exe is closed.
Quick status panel reports OPEN_POSITION_CONFIRMED, OPEN_POSITION_UNKNOWN, or NO_OPEN_POSITION_CONFIRMED.
STOP_MANIPULANTE.bat leaves STOP_BOT active before checks and uses explicit OPEN_POSITION_STATUS.
STOP_MANIPULANTE.bat calls the canonical safe stop script under MANIPULANTE/13_FTMO_TRIAL_AUTOMATION.
safe_stop_manipulante_processes.ps1 only targets project-specific python/cmd processes by script name and project path.

status_bat.note: STATUS_MANIPULANTE.bat delegates to STATUS_FTMO_TRIAL_AUTO.bat, which loops every 30 seconds; non-interactive evidence used the underlying panel.

phase46_local.warning_note: Existing heuristic keyword warnings; not part of Phase47D commit.

git.commit_message: Fix Manipulante MT5 reopen stop behavior

next_step_unique: Verify push and GitHub Actions for the selective Phase47D commit, then continue working-tree cleanup before Phase47A commit.
